title: passerina filiformis subsp. glutinosa
intro: Passerina filiformis subsp. glutinosa, also known as Glutinosa Passerina, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been used for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help in relieving symptoms of colds, fever, and sore throats, as well as supporting the immune system. Passerina filiformis subsp. glutinosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
